---
title: "Vagish Hemmige, MD MS"
year: 2026
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

<img src="images/headshot.jpg" alt="Vagish Hemmige" style="width:200px;border-radius:50%;float:right;margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;" />

## Overview

I am an infectious diseases physician with extensive experience with Transplant ID and HIV primary care. Interests include HIV-to-HIV thoracic transplantation, HIV prevention and treatment, and building open R tools for transplant data research.

- **Location:** New York, New York  
- **Clinical interests:** Transplant ID, HIV care & prevention, opportunistic infections  
- **Methods/tech:** R, Quarto, Arrow/DuckDB, reproducible pipelines

---

## Highlights

- Medical degree from NYU Grossman School of Medicine; >10 years practice experience.  
- 50+ publications

---

## Open-source projects (R)

- **sRtr** — Tools for working with UNOS/SRTR transplant data in R  
  Repo/docs: <https://vagishhemmige.github.io/sRtr/>

- **usRds** — Tools for working with the [United States Renal Data system](https://www.niddk.nih.gov/about-niddk/strategic-plans-reports/usrds)
  Repo/docs: <https://vagishhemmige.github.io/usRds/>

---

## Links

- **US News doctor profile**  
  <https://health.usnews.com/doctors/vagish-hemmige-719259>

- **ORCID**  
  <https://orcid.org/0009-0006-6346-1826>

- **Research/works**  
  <https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/?term=vagish+Hemmige&sort=date>
  
- **R packages**  
  sRtr: <https://vagishhemmige.github.io/sRtr/>  
  strobe: <https://vagishhemmige.github.io/strobe/>  
  usRds: <https://vagishhemmige.github.io/usRds/>
  CDCAtlas: <https://vagishhemmige.github.io/CDCAtlas/>
